chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-1413 of 2016 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Disposed of matter: 1. For hearing of CMA No.15783 of 2025 (Limitation) 2. For hearing of CMA No.15784 of 2025 (Recalling of order) 28.08.2025 Raja Qasit Nawaz, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr. Pervez Ahmed Mastoi, AAG ------------------ 1. Listed application bearing CMA No.15783/2025 has been preferred by the petitioner seeking condonation of filing restoration application. The instant petition was dismissed for non-prosecution vide order dated 15.05.2025 and the application for restoration was filed on 04.08.2025 (opening day after summer recess). Hence the same is within time. Instant application being infructuous, is dismissed. 2. Instant application has been filed for restoration of the instant petition as the same was dismissed for non-prosecution vide order dated 15.05.2025. Learned counsel has filed personal affidavit along with affidavit of attorney of the petitioner detailing the circumstances surrounding his absence on the given day. The petitioner has shown sufficient cause in the noted affidavits. In view of above, instant application being CMA No.15784/2025 is allowed. Petition is restored back to its original position. It is specified that the interim orders earlier subsisting no longer continued to hold the field. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem.
